name: rare-disease-consult
description: Structured rare disease differential diagnosis using a Delphi-style multi-agent reasoning pipeline. Three independent specialist agents (pattern-matcher, mechanism-reasoner, differential-excluder) reason from the same clinical intake with full HPO, PubMed, and WebSearch access, then iterate with anonymized aggregated feedback. Produces a grounded top-5 differential suitable for both patient review and sharing with a physician.
